prerequisites: A Height account with access to a workspace whose tasks, lists, and activities you want to sync.
An API key generated in your Height workspace (found in Height settings under the API section).
A start date to bound the initial sync window.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate by passing your Height API key in the Authorization header using the format `Authorization: api-key secret_xxxx`. Provide this value in the connector's required `api_key` field. All requests are made over HTTPS. Locate the key in your Height workspace settings under the API section.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your Height API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Height and open your workspace settings. Go to the API section to view your API key. This is the secret value used to authenticate requests in the `Authorization: api-key secret_xxxx` header format.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key in the connector's required `api_key` field. This field is stored as a secret and is sent in the `Authorization: api-key secret_xxxx` header on every request to the Height API over HTTPS.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required `start_date` field to define the earliest point from which records are synced. This bounds the initial backfill.

setupSteps.title: Optionally narrow results with a search query
setupSteps.body: Set the optional `search_query` field to filter which Height records are returned. Leave it empty to sync without an additional search filter.

sources.title: Height API authentication reference (unofficial OpenAPI spec)
